# About Me — Jane Doe

## Salary expectations
- Looking for ₹35-45 LPA for senior backend roles in India.
- Remote roles: $60-90k USD acceptable.

## Visa / work authorization
- Indian citizen, eligible to work in India without sponsorship.
- Open to remote roles globally.

## Why I want to leave my current role
I've outgrown the legacy stack and want to work on greenfield distributed systems.

## Voice / tone sample
I prefer direct, jargon-free writing. I value substance over polish.

## Side projects worth mentioning
- Built a personal RSS-to-email digest using FastAPI + Postgres.
- Contributed a small fix to httpx.

## Things I will NOT do
- Java-only shops.
- On-call rotations more than 1 week per quarter.
